creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Sneak peek to the newly launched Crystal Clear Boat 2.0 of @cc.watersports! 

• It’s bigger; can seat up to 6 people.
• It’s an electric boat with a captain, so you can just sit back, relax, enjoy the coastline and Burj Khalifa views.
• It’s totally transparent! Truly a unique water adventure to try in Dubai! 

🎟️ 125 AED per person

Tag your adventure buddies!

transcription.text: Daydream, I fell asleep amid the flowers For a couple of hours, on a beautiful day Daydream
